/usr/bin/ar qc libminis3_lib.a CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/uuid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/fs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/util/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/buffer/byte_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/epoll/event_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/epoll/acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/epoll/channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/epoll/notifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/epoll/timer_wheel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/http/http_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/http/http_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/http/http_response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/http/http_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/net/http/http_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/db/mysql_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/db/mysql_tx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/db/meta_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/storage/data_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/storage/cas_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/storage/gc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/service/auth_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/service/bucket_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/service/object_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/service/multipart_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/service/presign_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/handlers/bucket_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/handlers/object_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/handlers/multipart_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/handlers/presign_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/handlers/health_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/middleware/auth_middleware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/api/middleware/trace_middleware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minis3_lib.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libminis3_lib.a
